---
title: "Combine simulation results"
author: "Simulation Results"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cosmo
    code_folding: hide
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE, 
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8
)

# Load required libraries
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(gridExtra)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(viridis)  
library(here)  
library(purrr)
```

## Average over 50 runs and 2500 replications

```{r load_data, echo=FALSE}
# Set paths
data_path <- "C:/Users/yunji/Desktop/PheNorm/R/Simulation/simulation_results3"  
epsilon_path <- "C:/Users/yunji/Desktop/PheNorm/R/Simulation/simulation_results6"
epsilon_path2 <- "C:/Users/yunji/Desktop/PheNorm/R/Simulation/simulation_results7"
# Function to load RData file and return the results object
load_rdata_results <- function(file_path) {
  env <- new.env()
  load(file_path, envir = env)
  
  if("results" %in% ls(env)) {
    results <- env$results
    if("auc" %in% names(results)) {
      results$auc <- as.numeric(results$auc)
    }
    for(col in names(results)) {
      if(inherits(results[[col]], c("auc", "roc", "performance"))) {
        results[[col]] <- as.numeric(results[[col]])
      }
    }
    results$run_file <- basename(file_path)
    results$run_number <- as.numeric(gsub(".*run(\\d+)\\.RData", "\\1", basename(file_path)))
    return(results)
  } else {
    warning(paste("No 'results' object found in", file_path))
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Function to load epsilon strategy results
load_epsilon_results <- function(file_path) {
  env <- new.env()
  load(file_path, envir = env)
  
  if("results_epsilon" %in% ls(env)) {
    results <- env$results_epsilon
    if("auc" %in% names(results)) {
      results$auc <- as.numeric(results$auc)
    }
    for(col in names(results)) {
      if(inherits(results[[col]], c("auc", "roc", "performance"))) {
        results[[col]] <- as.numeric(results[[col]])
      }
    }
    results$run_file <- basename(file_path)
    results$run_number <- as.numeric(gsub(".*run(\\d+)\\.RData", "\\1", basename(file_path)))
    return(results)
  } else {
    warning(paste("No 'results_epsilon' object found in", file_path))
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Load original results
rdata_files <- list.files(path = data_path, 
                         pattern = "simulation_results_run.*\\.RData$", 
                         full.names = TRUE)
print(paste("Found", length(rdata_files), "original RData files"))
all_results_original <- map_dfr(rdata_files, load_rdata_results)

# Load epsilon results
epsilon_files <- list.files(path = epsilon_path, 
                            pattern = "simulation_results_epsilon_run.*\\.RData$", 
                            full.names = TRUE)
print(paste("Found", length(epsilon_files), "epsilon RData files"))
all_results_epsilon <- map_dfr(epsilon_files, load_epsilon_results)

# Filter epsilon results to LDA + rare_noninfo only
all_results_epsilon_filtered <- all_results_epsilon %>%
  filter(data_type == "LDA", scenario == "rare_noninfo")

print(paste("Epsilon results (LDA + rare_noninfo):", nrow(all_results_epsilon_filtered)))

# Remove LDA + rare_noninfo from original results
all_results_original_filtered <- all_results_original %>%
  filter(!(data_type == "LDA" & scenario == "rare_noninfo"))

print(paste("Original results after removing LDA + rare_noninfo:", nrow(all_results_original_filtered)))

# Combine datasets
all_results <- bind_rows(all_results_original_filtered, all_results_epsilon_filtered)

print(paste("Total observations loaded:", nrow(all_results)))
print(paste("Total runs:", n_distinct(all_results$run_number)))

# Check combinations
combinations <- all_results %>% 
  group_by(data_type, scenario, algorithm, set) %>% 
  summarise(n_obs = n(), n_runs = n_distinct(run_number), .groups = 'drop')
print(paste("Unique combinations:", nrow(combinations)))

# Calculate final summary
combined_data <- all_results %>%
  group_by(data_type, scenario, algorithm, set) %>%
  summarise(
    across(c(f1, precision, recall, accuracy, prob_mse, prob_mae, prob_correlation, auc),
           list(mean = ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE),
                sd = ~sd(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
           .names = "{.col}_{.fn}"),
    n_total_replications = n(),
    n_runs = n_distinct(run_number),
    .groups = 'drop'
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric) & !starts_with("n_"), ~round(.x, 6)))

# Save results
simulation_dir <- "C:/Users/yunji/Desktop/PheNorm/R/Simulation"
output_path <- file.path(simulation_dir, "combined_data.csv")
write.csv(combined_data, output_path, row.names = FALSE)
print(paste("Combined data saved to:", output_path))
print(paste("Final dataset dimensions:", nrow(combined_data), "rows x", ncol(combined_data), "columns"))
```
